AEGIS - Programmable Infrastructure for Uniswap v4 Pools
AEGIS ENGINE
Aegis Vault Challenge
Paste one Python strategy. Earn CL/LO edge. Keep vault equity delta near zero while AEGIS borrow/repay manages debt.
Load replay
Load score
Load board
Copy run command
Copy submit
Objective
Maximize final score from liquidity placement, same-swap limit-order fills, and fees after costs, interest, and penalties.
Neutrality rule
Delta is equity sensitivity to price. Good strategies keep normalized delta inside the safe band instead of winning through beta.
Vault rule
Borrow L-units, repay when needed, respect LTV and collateral floors, and repair before the vault locks you out.
1
Paste strategy
Use one Python file with AEGIS vault actions.
2
Run locally
Copy the command and generate replay plus score files.
3
Inspect replay
Scrub price, delta, LTV, swaps, fills, and errors.
4
Improve and submit
Compare leaderboard score, then submit the strategy.
